data.body: LANDED: Gerrit change https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/712 — LLM-Review +1, Verified +1 (CI run https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/actions/runs/29442143070), 0 unresolved comments, submitted (Rebase-If-Necessary) and MERGED as cd5532970 on main. Preflight: make lint + make typecheck green; make test 6018 passed, 1 failed = tests/unit/test_resolve_symbol_tool.py (known pre-existing env failure, bug c810, fixed in parallel by taxing-quasilegal-incatern which landed just before this change). Tests added: tests/unit/test_eval_solver.py::test_plan_review_novelty_novel_case_routes_and_scores and ::test_plan_review_novelty_carryover_case_routes_and_scores (offline FakeRunner, no network).
